description: ML-based lead scoring: predict conversion before contacting, reduce wasted effort

items.name: Historical conversion modeling
items.tactic: Gather 100+ lead attributes (company size, industry, job title, engagement, pricing signal, etc). Build model: what converts? Score new leads 0-100.

items.name: Intent signals (behavioral)
items.tactic: Website: pages visited, time spent, forms filled, pricing page views, demo requests. High intent = 3x conversion.

items.name: Churn prediction (retention)
items.tactic: Customer success: usage drop, support tickets up, engagement down = churn risk. Intervene 30 days early, save 40%.
